title: rubus inflatus
intro: Rubus inflatus, also known as the Inflated Bramble or Inflated Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus inflatus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
